creator: fbsd-ports@opsec.eu
text:
Hi!

You are listed as the maintainer for the freebsd port mail/imapsync.

The last three port updates sind 2012 went into maintainer timeout.

I want to take over the maintainership for that port,
would that be OK with you ?

See also

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=181237

-- 
pi@opsec.eu            +49 171 3101372                         7 years to go !
